name: marketing
description: A marketing strategy team — proves the topology is domain-agnostic. A campaign deliverable is drafted, fact-checked, editorially reviewed, then published into a shared doc. No code, no branches, no merge: integration is shared-doc.

signal-complete._comment: Each working stage emits a distinct signal channel so the conductor can route forward: draft→signal-complete, fact-check→validation-*, review→review-*, publish→merge-success. The conductor passes type/config/locks guards these rules don't consult — the single fallback rule always matches.

merge-success._integration: shared-doc: publish consolidated the deliverable into the shared folder; no locks to release.
